---
title: "Adapter Development Guide"
subtitle: "End-to-end guide for building production UIAO adapters"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Page in preparation
Full documentation is being drafted. See the [Adapter Authoring Tutorial](adapter-authoring-tutorial.qmd) to get started, and the [Adapter Plane appendix](appendix/a-adapter-plane/index.qmd) for the technical specification.
:::
